items.name: Waterloo Golf & Country Club Coasters
items.note: 20x round cork coasters, laser engrave. Cork = low power, high contrast — will look sharp. 🚩 LOGO: No public SVG/hi-res logo found online. Neall has a file — needs to hand it off. SVG strongly preferred; if only raster available, will need to vectorize before sending to laser. Club site: waterloocountryclub.com | IG: @waterloogcc

researchLog.query: Waterloo Golf & Country Club logo SVG PNG high-res
researchLog.result: No public logo found. waterloocountryclub.com exists (founded 1925, 9-hole course, Waterloo IL). No downloadable logo or crest located. Neall's file is the path forward.
